errors.invalid_domain: Please enter a valid domain URL
errors.invalid_cron: Please enter a valid refresh Cron expression
errors.admin_required: Name, email, and password are required

step1.title: Setup Spectra
step1.description: Fill in some additional information to finish your Spectra installation.
step1.domain_description: Enter the base URL for your Spectra installation. Usually you can just use the default value above.
step1.refresh_time_placeholder: Must be a valid Cron expression
step1.refresh_time_description_bold: Do not change this unless you know what you are doing.
step1.refresh_time_description: Spectra traverses the database periodically to clean up old data. The default "0 0 4 * * ?" means 4:00 AM every day.
step1.turnstile_description: Allow guests to upload at your site. If enabled, your site will be protected by Cloudflare Turnstile to prevent abuse.
step1.turnstile_hint_after: for free. The default values are test-only and must be replaced in production.
step1.previous_installation_title: Just updated from v0.1.5 or earlier?
step1.previous_installation_description: Here is the original config.toml from your previous installation for reference.

step2.title: Administrator Setup
step2.description: The administrator or the Root user indicates the instance's owner who has the highest privileges.
step2.avatar_pick: Click or drag a file here to upload avatar (optional)
step2.avatar_invalid: Only gif, bmp, jpg, png and webp image files are allowed
